title: Conduct visual inspection of park facilities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct visual inspection of park facilities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for visual inspection

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and inspection checklists and confirm inspection activities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and inspection checklists and confirm inspection activities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and inspection checklists and confirm inspection activities with supervisor.

pcs.text: Clarify the specific terminology used in checklists with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify the specific terminology used in checklists with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify the specific terminology used in checklists with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify park elements to be inspected and locate on the site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify park elements to be inspected and locate on the site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify park elements to be inspected and locate on the site plan.

pcs.text: Confirm park facilities, equipment and services on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm park facilities, equipment and services on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm park facilities, equipment and services on site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for visual inspection

elements.title: Undertake visual inspection

pcs.text: Inspect park facilities, equipment and services and compare to workplace standards of presentation and workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect park facilities, equipment and services and compare to workplace standards of presentation and workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect park facilities, equipment and services and compare to workplace standards of presentation and workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and record workplace presentation, workplace health and safety hazards and adverse environmental impacts using appropriate form and photographs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record workplace presentation, workplace health and safety hazards and adverse environmental impacts using appropriate form and photographs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record workplace presentation, workplace health and safety hazards and adverse environmental impacts using appropriate form and photographs.

pcs.text: Report situations requiring urgent action to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report situations requiring urgent action to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report situations requiring urgent action to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake visual inspection

elements.title: Submit report

pcs.text: Complete and check inspection activity reports and checklists are concise, accurate and comply with workplace standards, and include photographs where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and check inspection activity reports and checklists are concise, accurate and comply with workplace standards, and include photographs where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and check inspection activity reports and checklists are concise, accurate and comply with workplace standards, and include photographs where required.

pcs.text: Forward checklist and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Forward checklist and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Forward checklist and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Submit report

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
